Interactive atlas experiment

The Country Atlas

An interactive country atlas with live country cards, source-aware topic results, saved sources, and a session journey trail.

Drag to rotate. Scroll to zoom. Click a country to open live Wikipedia context. This version keeps a clean blue sphere with country-click logic hidden, plus Wikipedia search, article cards, structured source stack, and YouTube city/landscape video layer.

Field notebook

Journey Log

Saved discoveries from your atlas, arranged like a compact field journal.

Open countries on the globe and they will stack here as your session trail.
